title: Project scaffold: go.mod, models, DB, Makefile
description:
Set up the Go project foundation: module init, data model structs, SQLite database layer with schema and queries, and the Makefile.

This is the foundational task — all other tasks depend on the packages created here.

Refer to the design spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-13-ccs-design.md for full schema and structure details.

Key context:
- Use modernc.org/sqlite (pure Go, no CGO)
- DB location: ~/.config/ccs/ccs.db (create parent dirs on first open)
- The model package defines Session and Tag structs
- The db package handles connection, schema auto-migration on open, and all query functions (CRUD for sessions, tags, session_tags)
- Use github.com/spf13/cobra for CLI (just the root command in main.go for now)
requirements: Initialize go.mod with module name 'github.com/mihai/ccs' and Go 1.22+

Create internal/model/model.go with Session struct (ID, ProjectDir, Cwd, GitBranch, Name, FirstMessage, LastMessage, MessageCount, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt, FileSize, FileModTime) and Tag struct (ID, Name) — use time.Time for timestamps, int64 for sizes
Create internal/db/db.go with Open(dbPath string) function that opens/creates SQLite DB, runs migrations, returns *DB wrapper
Create internal/db/schema.go with the CREATE TABLE statements from the spec (sessions, tags, session_tags tables with indexes)

Create internal/db/queries.go with query functions: UpsertSession, DeleteSession, GetSessionByID, ListSessions(filters), SearchSessions(query), AddTag, RemoveTag, ListTags, GetSessionTags, ListProjects, PurgeMissingSessions(existingIDs []string)
Create cmd/ccs/main.go with cobra root command (name 'ccs', description 'Claude Code Session Manager') — no subcommands yet, just the skeleton
Create Makefile with targets: build (to bin/ccs), install (to ~/go/bin/), test (go test ./...), lint (go vet ./... && gofmt check), clean
Run go mod tidy to fetch dependencies
Verify the project compiles with 'go build ./cmd/ccs/' and tests pass with 'go test ./...'
